chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-962 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution of main petition as notices not issued as cost and copies not supplied by the learned counsel for the petitioner. 17.08.2023 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- A suit was filed by one Faisal Aijaz against the petitioners under the law of Removal of Encroachment Act. Suit of respondent No.1 was decreed as the petitioners were found to be encroachers of 282 sq. ft. of the common street. It was ordered by the District and Sessions Judge as an Anti-Encroachment Tribunal to take over trespassed land being encroached by petitioners and hence this petition was preferred. No document as such in this regard as to the encroached land was filed to establish their entitlement. Dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
